SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class EventMessageManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventMessageManager
public class EventMessageManager extends Object
Handles user-to-user messaging backed by Firebase Realtime Database.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventMessageManager()
    creates the manager for user message threads and chat messages

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<MessageThreadItem>
    buildThread(com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, String otherUid, String otherName)
    builds a message thread object for the current user and another user

    buildThreadId(String firstUid, String secondUid)
    builds the shared thread id for two users

    loads a message thread from the database

    readMessages(com.google.firebase.database.DataSnapshot snapshot)
    reads chat messages from a realtime database snapshot

    reads message threads from a realtime database snapshot

  • Constructor Details

    • EventMessageManager

      public EventMessageManager()
      creates the manager for user message threads and chat messages

  • Method Details

    • buildThreadId

      @NonNull public static String buildThreadId(@NonNull String firstUid, @NonNull String secondUid)
      builds the shared thread id for two users
      Parameters:
      firstUid - the uid of the first user
      secondUid - the uid of the second user
      Returns:
      the String thread id for the two users

    • buildThread

      @NonNull public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<MessageThreadItem> buildThread(@NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull String otherUid, String otherName)
      builds a message thread object for the current user and another user
      Parameters:
      currentUser - the signed in user
      otherUid - the uid of the other user
      otherName - the name of the other user
      Returns:
      a Task containing the message thread object

    • getThread

      @NonNull public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<MessageThreadItem> getThread(@NonNull String threadId)
      loads a message thread from the database
      Parameters:
      threadId - the String id of the thread
      Returns:
      a Task containing the loaded thread

    • sendMessage

      @NonNull public com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<Void> sendMessage(@NonNull MessageThreadItem thread, @NonNull com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser currentUser, @NonNull String text)
      sends a message in a thread and updates the thread preview information
      Parameters:
      thread - the thread the message belongs to
      currentUser - the signed in user sending the message
      text - the message text to send
      Returns:
      a Task that writes the message and updates the thread

    • readThreads

      @NonNull public List<MessageThreadItem> readThreads(@NonNull com.google.firebase.database.DataSnapshot snapshot)
      reads message threads from a realtime database snapshot
      Parameters:
      snapshot - the snapshot containing thread data
      Returns:
      the list of message threads sorted by most recent message

    • readMessages

      @NonNull public List<ChatMessageItem> readMessages(@NonNull com.google.firebase.database.DataSnapshot snapshot)
      reads chat messages from a realtime database snapshot
      Parameters:
      snapshot - the snapshot containing message data
      Returns:
      the list of chat messages sorted by time sent
